title: IDC Board Meeting — February 2025
agenda:
1. FY2024 Annual Results Review
2. FY2025 Q1 Portfolio Performance
3. Dividend Declaration
4. Privatisation Programme Update
5. Risk Register Review
minutes: The Board reviewed and approved FY2024 annual financial results. Net profit of ZMW 1.1 billion was noted. An interim dividend of ZMW 220 million was declared. The privatisation mandate for two portfolio companies was approved. The risk register was reviewed and noted.

resolutions.title: Approval of FY2024 Annual Financial Results
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2024 annual financial statements as presented.

resolutions.title: Declaration of Interim Dividend FY2024
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to declare an interim dividend of ZMW 220 million for FY2024.

title: IDC Special Board Meeting — January 2025
agenda:
1. Emergency Liquidity Support — Zambia Railways
2. ZAFCO Acquisition Update
minutes: The Board approved a ZMW 150 million emergency bridging facility to Zambia Railways subject to Ministry of Finance concurrence. The ZAFCO acquisition terms were approved.

resolutions.title: Emergency Bridging Facility to Zambia Railways
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve a ZMW 150 million emergency bridging facility to Zambia Railways Limited.

title: IDC Board Meeting — November 2024
agenda:
1. Q3 2024 Portfolio Performance
2. FY2025 Budget Approval
3. ZANACO NPL Update
4. ZESCO Tariff Application Progress
5. ESG Strategy Review
minutes: Q3 2024 portfolio performance noted. FY2025 budget of ZMW 7.5 billion approved. ZANACO NPL reduction plan endorsed. ZESCO tariff application strategy approved. ESG strategy adopted.

resolutions.title: Approval of FY2025 Annual Budget
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2025 annual budget of ZMW 7.5 billion.

title: IDC Board Meeting — Scheduled May 2025
agenda:
1. Q1 2025 Portfolio Performance
2. Privatisation Programme Progress
3. FY2024 Final Dividend
4. Risk Register Review
5. Board Evaluation Results
